title: Vodafone Idea is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Vodafone Idea is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vodafone Idea family as a Full Stack Developer in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vodafone Idea:
Vodafone Idea is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vodafone Idea!
